rationale: No relation between homestead exemption increase and interagency cooperation on juvenile discipline/safety. Statutes govern unrelated subject matter.
quote: Sec. 37.212. INTERAGENCY COOPERATION. The center shall promote cooperation between state agencies, institutions of higher education, and any local juvenile delinquency prevention councils to address discipline and safety issues in the state.
_note: Rule text concerns school discipline interagency cooperation; proposed change concerns property tax exemptions. No overlap.
